name: Bloomreach Commerce Experience API
what_it_does: Bloomreach REST API for commerce experience platform covering search, CDP (customer data platform), and content management. Enables AI agents to query product search results, retrieve personalization data, access customer segments, manage content, and integrate commerce intelligence into ecommerce workflows. Bloomreach combines search, CDP, and CMS for a unified commerce experience.
use_cases: Querying product search results and relevance ranking from ecommerce optimization agents
Retrieving customer segment and personalization data from CDP analytics agents
Accessing product recommendation data from merchandising automation agents
Integrating Bloomreach commerce intelligence into catalog and pricing workflow agents
not_for: Simple product search without personalization needs
best_when: An ecommerce team using Bloomreach wants AI agents to optimize product discovery, analyze customer segments, and integrate search and personalization data into merchandising and marketing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: CDP data includes customer behavioral profiles. GDPR and CCPA compliance required. Bloomreach is enterprise-priced.

auth.notes: Bloomreach uses API key authentication. Separate keys for Discovery (search) and Engagement (CDP) products. Keys available in account settings.

pricing.paid_tiers: Bloomreach Discovery, Engagement (CDP), and Content pricing negotiated
pricing.notes: Enterprise commerce platform. Significant investment. Three separate products with separate pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per product and plan; search has higher limits

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: CDP customer behavioral profiles require GDPR/CCPA compliance
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Bloomreach has three separate product APIs (Discovery, Engagement, Content) — each with separate auth
Customer behavioral data in CDP includes PII — design agents with privacy-first approach
Search relevance configuration affects results — test with real product catalogs
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer behavioral profiles in CDP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. EU data residency. Separate API keys per product module.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer behavioral and profile data in CDP. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2, ISO27001. EU data residency.
